summary: PR 2599 split Kirby's copied Purin/Jigglypuff SpecialN code out of `ftkirbyspecialdonkey` into a new `ftkirbyspecialpurin` translation unit, linked it as Matching in `configure.py`, and adjusted split/symbol metadata, headers, includes, and nearby declarations to reflect the new TU boundary.

key_files.role: new split TU for Kirby Purin SpecialN implementation; added 1406 lines
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: splits.txt adds ftkirbyspecialpurin.c text/data/sdata/sdata2 ranges

key_files.role: source TU reduced after Purin code was removed; includes/data/macros related to removed code were dropped
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: removes Purin helper/code block after ftKb_SpecialNPr_80100DE0
diff_excerpt: removes local SIGNF macro and local data declarations

key_files.role: new header for split Purin special file
old header reduced after Purin declarations moved out
split boundaries updated for donkey, new purin TU, adjacent fox/zelda section ranges
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: donkey text end changes to 0x80100E0C
diff_excerpt: zelda text start changes to 0x80105A34

key_files.role: symbol metadata adjusted around the new split, including local labels and local float/string objects
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: changes multiple 0x804D9498-0x804D94F4 sdata2 globals to local @ labels

key_files.role: links new split object as Matching
moves/adds shared SIGNF macro after removal from donkey TU
include/data cleanup for new split boundary
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: adds ftkirbyspecialzelda.h and ftKirby/ftkirbyspecialpurin.h includes
diff_excerpt: removes Vec3 ftKb_Init_803CB758 array from ftKb_Init.c

key_files.role: forward declaration/staticness cleanup with address comments
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: replaces grouped forward declaration comments with address-commented declarations
diff_excerpt: marks fn_8010C44C and fn_8010CD88 static

key_files.role: nearby Kirby special TU adjusted as part of split/link boundary
header added/expanded for zelda special declarations needed by adjusted includes
Purin source touched lightly during Kirby Purin split
static declaration list adjusted after split
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: removes static declaration for fn_8010CD88

what_changed: Created `src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftkirbyspecialpurin.c` and `.h` and removed a large Purin SpecialN block from `ftkirbyspecialdonkey.c`/`.h`.
Updated `config/GALE01/splits.txt` so donkey ends at `0x80100E0C`, new purin covers text `0x80100E0C-0x80105A34`, and zelda begins at `0x80105A34`; purin data/sdata/sdata2 ranges were also added.
Adjusted `symbols.txt` around the split by converting several former `ftKb_Init_*` globals to local `@` labels and adding a local data label.
Moved `SIGNF(x)` from a TU-local macro in `ftkirbyspecialdonkey.c` into `src/MSL/math.h`.
Updated Kirby init and nearby Kirby special files for includes, static declarations, and address-commented prototypes after the split.

smart_moves.text: The split was accompanied by metadata updates in both `splits.txt` and `symbols.txt`, not just a source-file move.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: symbols.txt changes local/global symbol ownership around 0x803CB710 and 0x804D9498

smart_moves.text: The new TU was linked explicitly in `configure.py` as Matching, preserving build configuration rather than leaving the split as source-only.
A macro used by the extracted code was lifted to a shared math header after being removed from the original donor TU.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When extracting a contiguous function range into a new fighter TU, update source, header, configure object status, split ranges, and symbol locality together; this PR shows all of those surfaces changing for `ftkirbyspecialpurin`.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: new ftkirbyspecialpurin.c/.h and reduced ftkirbyspecialdonkey.c/.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: A split may require adjusting adjacent TU boundaries and nearby section ownership, not only adding the new TU; fox `.sdata`, donkey text, purin ranges, and zelda text were all touched.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: fox .sdata end changes from 0x804D3DCC to 0x804D3DD0

naming_conventions.text: The extracted file follows the existing lowercase Kirby special filename pattern: `ftkirbyspecialpurin.c`/`.h`, parallel to neighboring `ftkirbyspecialfox`, `ftkirbyspecialness`, `ftkirbyspecialdonkey`, and `ftkirbyspecialzelda` entries shown in the split/config context.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: splits.txt neighboring Kirby special filenames

naming_conventions.text: Address-commented local prototypes in `ftKb_SpecialNYs.c` use the `/* 10XXXX */` prefix style for `fn_` symbols whose semantics are not named.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftKb_SpecialNYs.c declarations such as /* 1095DC */ static void fn_801095DC(...)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: TU split by exact address range
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The Purin code is carved from the old donkey text range into `0x80100E0C-0x80105A34`, with zelda shifted to start at `0x80105A34`.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: splits.txt donkey/purin/zelda text range edits

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Symbol scope/local-label correction for extracted data
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: Several data, sdata, and sdata2 entries were changed from named globals to local `@` labels after the new split was introduced.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: symbols.txt changes ftKb_Init_804D9498 through ftKb_Init_804D94F4 to local @ labels

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: `SIGNF(x)` was removed from the donor TU and added to `src/MSL/math.h`, likely to serve the extracted code without retaining a local duplicate.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Retain conservative address-style names where semantics are not established
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: Nearby declarations continue using `fn_8010....` names with address comments rather than speculative semantic names.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR 2599 metadata, merged state, changed file counts
metadata_json: zero issue comments and zero review comments
notes: The PR body is empty and there are no review or issue comments, so reviewer intent and rationale are unavailable.

The loaded diff is truncated; file-level counts and the shown excerpts support the main split/link conclusions, but full per-function contents of the new TU were not fully available in loaded context.
No build, objdiff, or CI output is included in the slice; `Object(Matching, ...)` is a configuration fact from the diff, not independent validation evidence.
Because the PR is mostly a split/link operation, lessons are limited to source/config/symbol surfaces visible in the diff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split fighter TUs require synchronized source, header, configure, splits, and symbols updates
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2599, extracting `ftkirbyspecialpurin` from `ftkirbyspecialdonkey` involved adding the new `.c`/`.h`, removing the old block from donkey files, adding the object to `configure.py` as Matching, updating `splits.txt` ranges, and correcting `symbols.txt` locality. This is a PR-specific example of keeping split metadata and source boundaries synchronized.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2599 introduced `ftkirbyspecialpurin` as a split Kirby fighter TU
source_update_candidates.text: `src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftkirbyspecialpurin.c` was added and linked as `Object(Matching, "melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftkirbyspecialpurin.c")`; `splits.txt` assigns it text `0x80100E0C-0x80105A34`, data `0x803CB710-0x803CB770`, sdata `0x804D3DD0-0x804D3DE8`, and sdata2 `0x804D9498-0x804D94F0`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for curator review; do not treat as accepted without source-corpus update.

source_update_candidates.title: PR 2599 adjusted adjacent Kirby special split boundaries
source_update_candidates.text: During the `ftkirbyspecialpurin` split, `ftkirbyspecialdonkey.c` text was shortened to end at `0x80100E0C`, `ftkirbyspecialzelda.c` text was moved to start at `0x80105A34`, and `ftkirbyspecialfox.c` `.sdata` end moved from `0x804D3DCC` to `0x804D3DD0`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Specific split metadata observed in this PR may be useful for path/split history curation.

source_update_candidates.title: SIGNF macro moved to MSL math header in PR 2599
source_update_candidates.text: The diff removes a local `#define SIGNF(x) ((x) > 0.0f ? 1.0f : -1.0f)` from `ftkirbyspecialdonkey.c` and adds the same macro to `src/MSL/math.h`.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a concrete source-history fact; avoid generalizing into a global macro-placement standard without more evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that every code split should be marked Matching; this PR only shows `ftkirbyspecialpurin.c` configured that way.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; the slice contains no review comments.
Do not claim a verified objdiff/build result from this slice; no validation logs are included.
Do not promote local `@` labels or split ranges as independently correct beyond the PR evidence without curator/source verification.
